name: AEGON-Industrial CSI300 End Idx Fd(LOF)A
summary: AEGON-Industrial CSI300 End Idx Fd(LOF)A is an index fund that tracks the performance of the CSI 300 Index and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF), with class A shares. The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to the top 300 companies listed on the Shanghai and Shenzhen stock exchanges. It is managed by AEGON-Industrial Fund Management Co., Ltd., a joint venture between Aegon and Industrial Securities.
